failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id AS profile_id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'broxadasinistra'
)
SELECT 
    tp.profile_id,
    p.description
FROM publication p
JOIN target_profile tp ON p.profile_id = tp.profile_id
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
